name: io.github.layervai/qurl-mcp
title: qURL
description: Mint, resolve, audit, and rotate expiring, scope-limited access links (qURLs) for AI agents — secure URL gateway for the qURL API. Lets agents act through scoped, expiring URLs instead of receiving raw credentials.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the qURL API with qurl:read, qurl:write, and/or qurl:resolve scopes. Obtain from https://layerv.ai.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: qURL API base URL. Defaults to https://api.layerv.ai.
